mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM as "ROWNUM" , C_TARGET_DATE as businessDay FROM ( SELECT C_TARGET_DATE FROM M_CALENDAR WHERE C_CALENDAR_ID = 'T003' AND C_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'JP' AND C_BUS_NONBUS_DIV = '2' AND C_DELETE_FLG = '0'
AND #{fct007Sql001RequestModel.date} < C_TARGET_DATE ORDER BY C_TARGET_DATE ASC
AND #{fct007Sql001RequestModel.date} > C_TARGET_DATE ORDER BY C_TARGET_DATE DESC
) ) WHERE "ROWNUM" = abs(#{fct007Sql001RequestModel.numberDay})
